fields.label: Line No
fields.def: @SQL=SELECT NVL(MAX(Line),0)+10 AS DefaultValue FROM C_ProjectLine WHERE C_Project_ID=@C_Project_ID@

fields.label: Sequence
fields.def: @SQL=SELECT NVL(MAX(SeqNo),0)+10 AS DefaultValue FROM C_ProjectPhase WHERE C_Project_ID=@C_Project_ID@

fields.label: Print detail records on pick list
Business Partner
fields.def: @SQL=SELECT C_BPartner_ID AS DefaultValue FROM C_Order WHERE C_Order_ID=@C_Order_ID@

fields.label: Line No
fields.def: @SQL=SELECT COALESCE(MAX(Line),0)+10 AS DefaultValue FROM C_OrderLine WHERE C_Order_ID=@C_Order_ID@

fields.label: Line No
fields.def: @SQL=SELECT NVL(MAX(Line),0)+10 AS DefaultValue FROM C_InvoiceLine WHERE C_Invoice_ID=@C_Invoice_ID@

fields.label: Line No
fields.def: @SQL=SELECT NVL(MAX(Line),0)+10 AS DefaultValue FROM M_InOutLine WHERE M_InOut_ID=@M_InOut_ID@

fields.label: Home Delivery Premium Type (For FedEx only)
Dot Hazard Class or Division (For FedEx only)
Remaining Amt
fields.def:
@SQL=SELECT MAX(p.PayAmt)-COALESCE(SUM(a.Amount),0)
FROM C_Payment p 
LEFT OUTER JOIN C_PaymentAllocate a ON (p.C_Payment_ID=a.C_Payment_ID)
WHERE p.C_Payment_ID=@C_Payment_ID@
